given: verifier keeps a baseArtifactId authorization finding when the changed code checks organization_id but never checks project access

candidate.title: baseArtifactId lookup bypasses project access
candidate.description: The public size-analysis response accepts baseArtifactId and loads that artifact by organization only, so a caller can compare against artifacts from projects they cannot access.
candidate.verification: Source: request.GET['baseArtifactId']. Sink: _get_base_artifact returns PreprodArtifact selected by id and project__organization_id only. Boundary: artifact project access is never checked before baseAppInfo and comparison data are returned.
